reasoning: Peru was mathematically eliminated from the 2026 FIFA World Cup qualifiers in early September 2025, following a 3-0 loss to Uruguay on Matchday 17 of the CONMEBOL qualifying tournament. According to the market's resolution criteria, if it becomes impossible for the team to win the World Cup based on FIFA rules (which occurs when a team fails to qualify), the market resolves immediately to 'No'. Since Peru has been eliminated prior to the knowledge cutoff of October 26, 2025, they cannot win the 2026 World Cup. Thus, the probability is 0 (capped at the 0.02 lower bound).
